radiology_report: Multiple colorectal liver metastases are present. No definite new extrahepatic disease is described. Interval size change is not available in this demo report.
clinical_question: Assess treatment response likelihood and whether this patient may be considered for surgical review.
guidelines: Colorectal liver metastasis management should be discussed in a multidisciplinary tumor board.
Resectability assessment depends on lesion distribution, future liver remnant, vascular involvement, extrahepatic disease, and patient fitness.
Systemic therapy response and repeat imaging are commonly used to guide treatment sequencing.
